description: Triggered when the user wants to create SEO comparison pages, 'vs' pages, or competitor alternative pages for capturing competitive search traffic.
should_trigger: Create a 'Notion alternative' page for our project management tool
Build a 'vs' comparison page: our tool vs Asana
I want to rank for 'best Slack alternatives' — help me create that page
Create a competitor comparison page targeting Salesforce users who want to switch
Build a page targeting searches for 'Figma vs Sketch'
What's the best structure for an alternatives page targeting Airtable users?
Help me create comparison pages for all our main competitors
should_not_trigger: Write a blog post about project management best practices
Create a features page for our product
How do I improve my existing homepage conversion rate?
Research what our competitors are doing in their marketing
